series_metadata.series_description: Cumulative spreadsheet tracking the hours worked as submitted by all office staff for each two-week pay period.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. If Federal funds are involved, retain for 3 years unless there is a finding. Then retain until after the finding is resolved. Shred. ; Electronic: Permenant, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
